trips.title: Snow Basin Overnight
trips.subtitle: Snow Basin, Utah
trips.summary_short: One night at Snow Basin with Dad, Keishin, Perrin, Cole, and Alex. Good crew, good food, and Cole & Alex's first campfire.

trips.title: South Skyline Trail
trips.subtitle: Ogden Valley Overlook, Utah
trips.summary_short: Two miles to the ridgeline above Ogden Valley with Dad and Keishin. City lights on both sides, and a rare calm night on a usually-windy summit.

trips.title: North Fork Culter Creek
trips.subtitle: Eden, Utah
trips.summary_short: One cold night in late April. Frost in Perrin's bivy, a 5 AM fire, and Keishin keeping everyone warm.

trips.title: North Fork
trips.subtitle: Eden, Utah
trips.summary_short: Hilltop camp with 360° views above the North Fork River Trail. Spring runoff, rocky terrain, and Keishin slipping three times.
